```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Test input validation with schema enforcement"
---
# Validation Tests
## Task
Write tests for input validation and schema enforcement.
## Requirements
1. Test required vs optional field validation.
2. Test type coercion and type mismatch errors.
3. Test string pattern validation (email, URL, UUID).
4. Test numeric range and length constraints.
5. Test nested object validation.
## Constraints
- Test valid and invalid inputs equally. Verify error messages are user-friendly.
## Success Criteria
- All validation rules tested. Error messages match. Invalid input rejected clearly.
```
